name: qr-menu-ordering-system
description: QR Menu Ordering System for Restaurants & Cafes

scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names "backend,guest,admin" --prefix-colors "cyan,green,magenta" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix guest-app" "npm run dev --prefix admin-dashboard"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix guest-app && npm install --prefix admin-dashboard
